content: EXIF import dual-store (CONTEXT 89.1): imported phone photos with EXIF orientation != 1 are baked to an UPRIGHT PNG display master stored at exhibits/{slug}/assets/{name} (object.source, published), while the UNTOUCHED original is preserved at exhibits/{slug}/assets-original/{name} (provenance, NOT published unless opted in). ObjectMeta.provenance={exifOrientation,transform,originalName}. Coord layer stays orientation-blind. Reader=readExifOrientation (core exif/read.ts); bake=studio bake.ts (createImageBitmap from-image). Gate=exif/read.test.ts vs test/fixtures/exif/manifest.json.

AV first-class note (CONTEXT 81, import-only v1): transcript notes are supplementing W3CAnnotations targeting the canvas with a media-fragments t=start,end FragmentSelector (written by importTranscript/cuesToNotes). Read them back with parseTimeFragment + activeNoteIndex (core av/time.ts; half-open [start,end), most-recently-started wins on overlap). Viewer MediaPlayer.svelte renders audio/video + a transcript prose-spine (NarrativeReader idiom over time); ExhibitView routes data.objects[selected].mediaType sound/video to the player (mediaType round-trips via toCanvas/objectsFromManifest, zero manifest changes). AV INGEST (codec/size/upload + Studio transcript-import UI) stays GATED per 152.

Studio AV hand-annotation (archie-av Q-1; temporal analogue of OSD draw). current.mediaType sound/video -> AvEditor.svelte (in {#key canvasId}) instead of Canvas; OSD draw tools hidden. AvEditor: audio/video + 'Set in' (pending in-point as dismissable chip) -> 'Add note' (in->playhead, or 5s at playhead) -> onCreateTime -> session.createNote(timeSel canvasId start end, motivation supplementing) -> selects -> SHARED WADM form. Form has a CONDITIONAL time fieldset (start/end seconds) shown when the note selector parses as a time fragment (timeOf) -> applyTime->editNote. Clicking a sidebar note seeks the player (AvEditor effect on bound selected). ObjectMeta gained mediaType/duration (passed via buildFullLibrary+openZip). addObject infers mediaType via mediaTypeFromSource; addObjectFromFile rejects non-image (AV file ingest gated 152). KEY: image and AV share ONE sidebar + WADM form + publish pipeline (not forked) - symmetry with the OSD path.

Studio Playground/Project is PER-EXHIBIT (archie-persistence Q-1): isTemplate(slug)=bundled DEFAULT_EXHIBITS -> playground (amber Example banner, save() no-ops, openExhibit seeds fresh, never persists); user-created exhibit -> project (saved, no banner). keepCopy() forks an example to a saved user exhibit carrying head notes retargeted to the copy canvas IRIs. Library structure always persists; only example annotations ephemeral. NOT a session mode (that first cut failed the gate as incoherent).
